_comment_usb: Default USB ID is 264a:233d — omit idVendor/idProduct to use defaults
_comment_font_scale: font_scale_percent scales all widget fonts by (background_width/480) * (LCD_max_DPI/96) * (percent/100). LCD max DPI is ~127 for the 3.9 inch 480x128 panel. Use 100 for full DPI boost, lower to reduce (e.g. 75), or 0 to disable scaling.
_comment_ping: Short ping/pong keep-alive (0x85/0x87) keeps USB connected; full JPEG uploads use dashboard_interval_sec
_comment_notes: Configuration options explained:
USB Settings:
usb_timeout_ms: Timeout for USB bulk transfers (default: 30000 = 30 seconds)
packet_delay_ms: Delay between sending packets (default: 1000 = 1 second)
enable_dashboard: Enable periodic dashboard JPEG uploads (default: true)
dashboard_interval_sec: How often to refresh the dashboard (default: 10 seconds)
update_interval_sec: Legacy alias for dashboard_interval_sec
Ping-Pong Keep-Alive:
enable_ping: Enable periodic keep-alive pings to prevent device timeout (default: true)
ping_interval_sec: How often to send ping packets (default: 30 seconds)
Note: Pings are only sent when display updates aren't being sent
Performance Tips:
- If experiencing timeouts, try increasing usb_timeout_ms to 60000 or more
- If experiencing USB errors, try increasing packet_delay_ms to 2000
- For slower updates, increase dashboard_interval_sec (e.g., 30 for every 30 seconds)
- Disable dashboard uploads but keep USB alive with enable_dashboard: false
- Disable ping if your device doesn't need it (enable_ping: false)
Widget Types:
text: Static text display
date: Current date
time: Current time
cpu_bar: CPU utilization bar graph
ram_bar: RAM utilization bar graph
loadavg: System load average
network: Network upload/download speed
dynamic_text: Dynamic text with format string
